zh.lifeSummary: 當Gervase Gibbon於1504年出生在英國肯特貝嫩登時，他的父親Robert Gibbons30歲，母親Margaret22歲。他於大約1530年與Mrs. Gervase Gibbon在英國英格蘭肯特貝嫩登結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特貝嫩登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gervase Gibbon于1504年出生在英国肯特貝嫩登时，他的父亲Robert Gibbons30岁，母亲Margaret22岁。他于大约1530年与Mrs. Gervase Gibbon在英国英格兰肯特貝嫩登结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他埋葬在英国英格兰肯特貝嫩登。

nameMeanings.name: Gibbon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Giboin (ancient Germanic Gebawin).
English: alternatively, a diminutive of the personal name   Gibb  .
Scottish and Irish: variant of   McGibbon  .

variants.name: Gibb
meanings: English: from the personal name Gibb, a pet form of Gilbert (compare Gibbs ). This surname is also frequent in Scotland.

variants.name: Gibbons
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of Gibbon , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
Irish (Mayo): in Ireland, the name is frequent and has been Gaelicized as Mac Giobúin. It is also found as a variant of Fitzgibbon .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Gervase Gibbon was born in 1504, in Benenden, Kent, England, his father, Robert Gibbons, was 30 and his mother, Margaret, was 22. He married Mrs. Gervase Gibbon about 1530, in Benenden, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He was buried in Benenden, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gervase Gibbon est né en 1504, à Benenden, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Robert Gibbons, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Margaret, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. Gervase Gibbon environ 1530, à Benenden, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Ilenterré à Benenden, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gervase Gibbon 1504 in Benenden, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Gibbons 30 und seine Mutter Margaret 22. Er hat um 1530 in Benenden, Kent, England, United Kingdom Mrs. Gervase Gibbon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er wurde in Benenden, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gervase Gibbon è nato il nel 1504 nel Benenden, Kent, England, il suo padre, Robert Gibbons, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Margaret, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Mrs. Gervase Gibbon circa 1530, nel Benenden, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Fu sepolto a Benenden, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Gervase Gibbonが1504年にイギリスケントベンエンデンで生まれた時，父Robert Gibbonsは30歳，母Margaretは22歳であった。約1530年にイギリスイギリスケントベンエンデンでMrs. Gervase Gibbonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリスイギリスケントベンエンデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gervase Gibbon(이)가 1504년 영국 켄트 베니든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Gibbons(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1530년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 베니든에서 Mrs. Gervase Gibbon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 베니든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gervase Gibbon nasceu em 1504, em Benenden, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Gibbons, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Margaret, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs. Gervase Gibbon aproximadamente 1530, em Benenden, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele foi sepultado em Benenden, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gervase Gibbon родился в 1504 г. в местности биненден, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Gibbons было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Gervase Gibbon около 1530 г. в местности биненден, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он был похоронен в местности биненден, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gervase Gibbon nació en 1504, en Benenden, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Gibbons, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Margaret, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Mrs. Gervase Gibbon aproximadamente 1530, en Benenden, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Fue sepultado en Benenden, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
